description: A group of Romanichal criminals from Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, who specialized in stealing fine art and antiques from English country houses over 20 years. The gang stole goods worth an estimated £30-80 million and were sentenced to a total of 49 years in prison in August 2008. Members included Ricky Johnson, his sons Richard and Albi, nephew Daniel O'Loughlin, and Michael Nicholls.
